title: About Psychology Direct | 15+ Years Connecting Experts
description: Founded in 2008, Psychology Direct connects organisations with 1,000+ vetted psychologists and psychiatrists across the UK.

blocks.headline: Get Expert Matched in Hours, Not Weeks
blocks.subtitle: Since 2008, we've grown into the UK's most trusted network. 1,000+ vetted professionals nationwide. We handle the hard part so you can focus on your case.

blocks.heading: How We Work
blocks.subheading: A people-first approach built into every interaction

cards.title: Dedicated Client Managers
cards.description: You get one person who knows your case, your deadlines, and your needs. They advocate for you from start to finish.

cards.title: Rigorous Vetting & QA
cards.description: Every expert is registered with HCPC or GMC. All are DBS checked and insured. Every report is proofread and quality-checked before we send it.

cards.title: Fair Pay, Professional Support
cards.description: We pay our experts fairly. We handle the admin so they focus on client care. We offer supervision and CPD opportunities.

blocks.heading: Our Values
blocks.subheading: The principles that guide everything we do

cards.title: Professionalism & Accountability
cards.description: We do what we promise, on time, transparently. No hidden fees. No surprises. Your Client Manager is accountable to you.

cards.title: Empathy & Respect
cards.description: We know the pressure you're under. Tight deadlines. Complex cases. Budget constraints. We care about every enquiry and every expert.

cards.title: Openness, Honesty & Integrity
cards.description: We're honest about what we can deliver. We're open to feedback. Integrity guides how we treat you and our professionals.

cards.title: Teamwork & Shared Success
cards.description: Your success is our success. We work as a team — with you, our experts, and each other — to get the best outcome for every case.

blocks.heading: A Team That Cares
blocks.body: We're not a faceless directory. We're a dedicated team of client managers, coordinators, and support staff who genuinely care about every case. Your Client Manager knows your deadlines, your requirements, and your preferences. They advocate for you from first contact to report delivery.

team.name: Aaron Banham
team.bio: Built Psychology Direct over 15+ years into the UK's most trusted expert-matching service.

team.name: Denise Leander
team.bio: Ensures every case meets our standards. Supports and develops every team member.

team.name: Daisy Hill
team.bio: Leads legal expert matching. Deep knowledge of courts and solicitor needs.

team.name: Katie Séverin
team.bio: Manages our educational psychology team. Knows what local authorities and schools need.

blocks.heading: Want to Learn More About Our Team?
blocks.bodyText: Meet the people who handle your cases, support your experts, and drive our commitment to quality. You'll work with someone you trust.

blocks.imageAlt: Map showing Psychology Direct's nationwide UK coverage
blocks.heading: Nationwide Coverage, Local Expertise
blocks.body: With 1,000+ professionals across the UK, we match experts to your location, specialism, and timeline. Whether you're in London, Glasgow, or rural Wales, we find the right person near your client. Our national reach means you never wait for availability.

testimonials.quote: Psychology Direct provides services that are reliable, efficient, flexible, cost effective, proactive and totally empathetic to our needs.
testimonials.name: Stephen Higgins
testimonials.title: Principal Educational Psychologist

testimonials.quote: Staff are helpful and informative with a range of experts second to none.
testimonials.name: Brent Patterson
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: I have worked with Psychology Direct as their associate for several years. They go out of their way to ensure the administration runs smoothly and make the process stress-free.
testimonials.name: Dr E A
testimonials.title: Chartered Counselling Psychologist

blocks.heading: Ready to Work With Us?
blocks.bodyText: Whether you're looking to instruct an expert or join our network, let's talk. No pressure. Just real conversations.
